## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking)

## Checklist

- [ ] `bun run lint` passes
- [ ] `bun run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `bun run test` passes
- [ ] `bun run build` passes
- [ ] Added or updated tests for the changed behavior
- [ ] Added a changeset (`bunx changeset`) if a publishable package changed
- [ ] Updated docs / examples / skills if the public API changed
